Citation_Excerpt: ## MaskFactory integration  MaskFactory remains the source of mask truth and certification. Main integrates through a `MaskFactoryAdapter`:  - Mode A reads approved package assets through the installed node pack or package API. It is read-only and may support production only when the package status, hashes, ontology, transforms, and certificate satisfy the requesting pass. - Mode B calls `/predict` or `/refine`. Outputs remain machine drafts and may support experimentation/repair proposals; their promotion authority is determined separately by exact certificates. - Service unavailability, unknown taxonomy, wrong person index, image-hash mismatch, stale package revision, or transform mismatch blocks the dependent pass without preventing unrelated work.
